publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2024-08-16 23:59:19 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

accessrestrict.head: Restrictions on Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to Box 6 (contracts and business correspondence) is restricted until 2035.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Contains newspaper and magazine clippings, art work, hip-hop flyers, photographs, materials documenting the activities of Rock Steady Crew, books, catalogs, posters, awards, and other ephemera. The collection also includes video documentation of dance and related hip-hop events.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Crazy Legs Papers, #8489. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Richie Colon (Crazy Legs) is the President of the Rock Steady Crew, an American breakdancing and hip-hop group.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Due to the fragility and potential degradation of moving image and sound recordings, viewing and listening is limited to items that have been digitized. If an item is in another media format, you may request to have the item digitized for access. Information on ordering access copies may be found on the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections webpage.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: 2. Use of digitized audio visual materials is limited to on-site access only.

separatedmaterial.head: Separated Materials
separatedmaterial.p: DeJesus E. (2003). Makin' it : the hip-hop guide for true survival. The author: [Place of publication not identified].
Piaggi, A. (1988). Antonio 88. [Milano]: Moda in Italy.

did.unittitle: Sketch book and handmade birthday card

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes pictures of Crazy Legs and the Rock Steady Crew at Rock Steady Park, NYC.

did.unittitle: Citations of Merit from Adolfo Carrion, Jr., President of the Borough of the Bronx
First gig and what they got paid @ the Kitchen
Flyers for shows at the Roxy
Flyers for shows at the Roxy (mounted)
Letters from a girlfriend who was dusted
Letters written in defense of black ball in the park and ltrs of thanks

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes group picture possibly taken at 1983 Royal Varsity Performance.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes signed photos of Grandmaster Caz and Tito Puente, Jr.

did.unittitle: Puerto Rico Day Parade and WDSF Youth Breakin' World Champion

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes invitation to appear before the Queen.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Three portfolios and loose copy of Life Magazine. Special Issue 1982. The Year in Pictures

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Five portfolios, one of which includes event postcards.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Arranged alphabetically by publication title. Also includes event calenders.

did.unittitle: Breaking and the New York City Breakers / Michael Holman ; Englewood Cliffs, N.J. : Dynasty Group
Fresh, Hip Hop Don't Stop / Nelson George…[et al.] ; New York: Random House
Getting Up: Subway Graffiti in New York / Craig Castleman ; Cambridge, Mass. : MIT Press
The Hip Hop Cookbook: Four Elements Cooking / Cutmaster GB ; Berlin : From Here to Fame Pub.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Colon was featured as a model in both catalog and Sean John promotional postcards.

did.unittitle: Def Jam Fight NY: Prima Official Game Guide
Radikal: Le Magazine du Mouvement Hip-Hop

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes November 1993 issue signed by Grandmaster Flash, DJ Kool Herc, Afrika Bambaataa, and Chuck D.

did.unittitle: Wild Style: Break Dance Rap Graffity Art by Charlie Ahearn

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Japanese edition. Booklet with accompanying audio cassette.

did.unittitle: Wild Style: Hip-Hop, Rap Music in N.Y.
Red Bull Beat Battle promotional cards
Used To Wish I Could Break With Rock Steady / Rock Steady Crew

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Crotona Ave. Side / Bronx River Side

did.unittitle: Used To Wish I Could Break With Rock Steady / Rock Steady Crew

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Crotona Ave. Side / Bronx River Side

did.unittitle: Zulu National 20th Anniversary Day One part 2 and day 2 & 3; Duck (?) and Armory Tape 2, Nov. 11, 12, 13
Series V. T-Shirts and event badges
Latino Living Legends Unveiling Ceremony badhe
Meridian Entertainment press badge signed by Grandmaster Caz, DJ Tony Tone, and (illegible)
Red Bull BC One 10 Seoul World Final press badge

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Small, brown vintage gym bag in which badges and pendants were stored.
